data.description:
## Story E: Per-file gate consumes `commands.test_file_runner` with `{file}` placeholder

### Description
**What**: Update the per-commit test-gate hook's per-file code path to read `commands.test_file_runner` and substitute `{file}` with the target file path. When the key is unset, fall back to `$commands.test_runner <file>` (file appended positionally).
**Why**: The per-file gate path is used by background-execution-primitive epic (a524-fded) and by centrality-aware test selection. Hardcoded language-specific invocations prevent polyglot support at this layer.
**Scope**:
- IN: per-file gate read + substitution logic, fallback semantics, logging of the effective command in verbose/debug mode
- OUT: full-suite gate path (covered by Story C), onboarding writing the file runner key (opt-in — user configures if they want the distinction; onboarding can set it automatically for pytest as `pytest {file}`)

### Done Definitions
- When this story is complete, the per-file gate reads `commands.test_file_runner`, substitutes `{file}` with the target path, and invokes the resulting command
  ← Satisfies: "commands.test_file_runner (optional companion key) defined and documented ... accepts a `{file}` placeholder that the gate substitutes"
- When this story is complete, a project that sets only `commands.test_runner` (no file runner key) gets per-file invocations as `$commands.test_runner <file>` (file appended positionally)
  ← Satisfies: "when unset the per-file gate falls back to commands.test_runner with the file appended as a positional argument"

### Considerations
- [Maintainability] Substitution uses a literal `{file}` marker, not a shell variable — documented in CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md examples
- [Testing] Unit tests cover both the with-placeholder and fallback (positional-append) paths
- [Testing] Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic
## Escalation Policy
**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
data.title: As a developer, per-file test gating uses commands.test_file_runner with the {file} placeholder
